## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Saskia to Prophecy content creation process and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy articles are 2000-3500 words, targeting enterprise data leaders with a focus on self-service data platforms](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Content generation leverages AI tools (Claude, Gemini) and webinar transcripts to create differentiated, authoritative content](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Specific workflows exist for article structure, SEO optimization, CTA creation, and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Saskia will review existing articles, update reports, and wait for Ismail's video demo before attempting her first article](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

## Topics

### Prophecy Article Structure and SEO

  - [Articles follow a template: SEO sections, main content, benefits, CTA](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [SEO sections fulfill algorithm expectations with definitions, examples, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Main content differentiates by using webinar insights and platform leader language](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Titles are long and specific to create intrigue for enterprise readers](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=2480.0)
  - [Meta titles are shorter but still punchy, generated using Claude](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=2725.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Ismail uses Gemini AI for large context processing of webinar transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [Custom prompts help generate article outlines and content](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [Process takes \~1.5 hours per article for Ismail due to AI proficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3454.0)
  - [Saskia will receive video walkthrough and prompts to learn the process](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3379.0)

### Prophecy Narrative and Positioning

  - [Focus on resolving data engineering bottlenecks for enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3805.0)
  - [Emphasize self-service capabilities for business teams](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3780.0)
  - [Avoid overtly pushing Prophecy until final CTA section](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=2962.0)
  - [CTAs drive to relevant e-book downloads, not direct sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3105.0)

### Image Creation Workflow

  - [Use Midjourney AI to generate initial images from article sections](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=4024.0)
  - [Compile images by Thursday for designer to brand](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
  - [Replace placeholder images with branded versions before staging](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=4115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to review 10+ existing Prophecy articles and note patterns](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3610.0)
  - [Finish updating Looker report and create pre-call update](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Ismail to record video walkthrough of article creation process](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=4148.0)
  - [Saskia to attempt first article draft after receiving video and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=3648.0)
  - [Ismail available for questions and review of Saskia's initial work](https://fathom.video/share/2GtjsGqmsMZjzt4kFqKfp2v4r3pze5H1?tab=summary&timestamp=4160.0)
